assertions.title: Experiment Discovery Flow — Leaderboard to Detail to Snapshots to Retention

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8050 and wait for load
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded successfully, leaderboard with all experiments visible

steps.action: Set era to LongMemEval and search for exp_lme_0008
steps.expected: Leaderboard filtered to show exp_lme_0008 as first result
steps.observed: exp_lme_0008 visible as first row with overall=0.4630, retrieval=0.3656, plausibility=0.5605, status=accepted_cv

steps.action: Double-click on exp_lme_0008 row to open detail view
steps.expected: Detail view opens showing exp_lme_0008 data
steps.observed: Detail view opened with correct experiment ID (exp_lme_0008), LongMemEval · Phase 8 badge, all key metrics displayed

steps.expected: Metrics match leaderboard: overall=0.4630, retrieval=0.3656, plausibility=0.5605
steps.observed: OVERALL SCORE: 0.4630, RETRIEVAL SCORE: 0.3656, PLAUSIBILITY SCORE: 0.5605 — all match at 4 decimal places

steps.action: Check CV data in detail view
steps.expected: CV panel shows k=5, mean=0.3466, std=0.0296
steps.observed: Cross-Validation Results section shows k=5, CV MEAN (OVERALL): 0.3466, CV STD (OVERALL): 0.0296, WORST FOLD: 0.3639, fold deltas displayed

steps.action: Check snapshot mini-charts in detail view
steps.expected: Snapshot Timeline chart shows data for exp_lme_0008
steps.observed: Snapshot Timeline chart visible with Overall Score, Retrieval Score, Plausibility Score line traces across ticks 0-200

steps.action: Click Back to Leaderboard, navigate to Retention Curves, select exp_lme_0008
steps.observed: Retention curve overlay showed exp_lme_0008 (selected along with exp_lme_0002 since minimum 2 experiments required). Chart with Plotly toolbar (Box Select, Lasso Select) confirmed active chart.

steps.action: Return to Leaderboard via tab click
steps.expected: Leaderboard displays with era=LongMemEval and search=exp_lme_0008 preserved
steps.observed: Era=LongMemEval, search=exp_lme_0008 both preserved. exp_lme_0008 visible as first row with same scores.

evidence.network: No API calls — all data served by Dash from server-side state

steps.action: Open detail view for exp_lme_0008 and record scores
steps.expected: Scores match leaderboard at 4 decimal places
steps.observed: OVERALL SCORE = 0.4630, RETRIEVAL = 0.3656, PLAUSIBILITY = 0.5605 — all identical to leaderboard

steps.action: Verify CV data in detail view
steps.observed: k=5, CV MEAN (OVERALL)=0.3466, CV STD (OVERALL)=0.0296 — all match specification

steps.action: Navigate to Forgetting & CV tab, select exp_lme_0008 in CV panel
steps.expected: CV panel shows same scores as detail view
steps.observed: CV panel shows Mean: 0.3466 ± 0.0296, fold scores: [0.3852, 0.3366, 0.3069, 0.3639, 0.3404] — identical to detail view

steps.action: Navigate to Snapshot Viewer and select exp_lme_0008
steps.expected: Snapshot viewer shows data for exp_lme_0008
steps.observed: Snapshot Viewer shows exp_lme_0008 (11 ticks) with active chart displaying metric traces
Leaderboard overall=0.4630, Detail overall=0.4630, Detail CV mean=0.3466, CV tab mean=0.3466 — all consistent

evidence.network: No API calls — Dash server-side rendering

steps.action: On Leaderboard, set era=LongMemEval and status=improved
steps.expected: Leaderboard filtered to 3 experiments with improved status in LongMemEval era
steps.observed: Leaderboard shows exactly 3 experiments: exp_lme_0068 (0.6516), exp_lme_0059 (0.3448), exp_lme_0002 (0.3360) — all with status=improved
Era button shows 'LongMemEval', status button shows 'improved' with 'Clear selection' link — both preserved
Era button shows 'LongMemEval', status button shows 'improved' with 'Clear selection' link — both preserved
Era button shows 'LongMemEval', status button shows 'improved' with 'Clear selection' link — both preserved

steps.expected: Era=LongMemEval and status=improved preserved, same 3 experiments visible
steps.observed: Era=LongMemEval, status=improved, same 3 experiments visible (exp_lme_0068, exp_lme_0059, exp_lme_0002) with identical scores

evidence.network: No API calls — Dash server-side state management

frictions.description: AG Grid row clicks toggle selection instead of opening detail view on some occasions. Double-click (agent-browser dblclick) works reliably the first time but becomes unreliable after navigating back. JavaScript dispatchEvent on row/cell does not trigger Dash cellClicked callback. Workaround: use agent-browser dblclick on the experiment ID gridcell ref.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser dblclick @e25 (gridcell ref for exp_lme_0008) to open detail view. When dblclick failed on subsequent attempts, used JavaScript checkbox click approach for Dash custom dropdowns.

frictions.description: Dash custom dropdown (dash-dropdown) components use virtualized rendering that doesn't respond to standard accessibility-tree clicks. agent-browser click on option text closes dropdown without selecting. Checkboxes within options are not reachable via standard Playwright clicks.
frictions.resolution: Used JavaScript to dispatch mousedown/mouseup/click events on the checkbox input elements within .dash-options-list-option containers. This reliably triggers the Dash callback to register selections.

frictions.description: Retention Curve Overlay requires minimum 2 experiments to be selected — single selection shows no chart. The dropdown closes when clicking an option, requiring re-opening between selections.
frictions.resolution: Selected both exp_lme_0002 and exp_lme_0008 via JavaScript checkbox clicks in a single pass, which kept the dropdown open and registered both selections simultaneously.

frictions.description: Parameter Sweep chart is empty by default — requires selecting dimensions before any data is displayed (known issue VAL-PARAMS-001). Could not fully verify exp_lme_0008 score in parameter sweep tooltip.
frictions.resolution: Verified score consistency through other views (leaderboard, detail view, CV panel, snapshot viewer) instead. Parameter sweep tooltip score verification was not critical since all other views confirmed consistency.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. VAL-CROSS-003: Full discovery flow (Leaderboard→Detail→Snapshots→Retention→Back) works correctly with consistent data for exp_lme_0008. VAL-CROSS-005: Score 0.4630 identical across leaderboard and detail view; CV mean 0.3466 identical across detail view and CV panel, all at 4 decimal places. VAL-CROSS-006: Sidebar filters (era=LongMemEval, status=improved) persist across Leaderboard→Timeline→Parameter Sweep→Heatmap→Leaderboard navigation with no reset.
